title: Snow update
description: This modification adds winter-themed items to minecraft.
body: Have you noticed that there is no snow update in Minecraft? We have created a snow update! You can download it to try out new features, craft items, and kill enemies with new weapons that have a slow-down effect. We have added Falling Snow, Snow Bow, Ice Sword, Snow Zombie, new decorative blocks, Snow grass, foliage and berries. Try it out right now!
